qualitative_claims.claim: 10^3-10^6 SNR improvement over spontaneous (Abstract line 31 + Section III.C)
qualitative_claims.support: Grisins 2016 quotes ~10^9 repetitions to resolve spontaneous correlations at 5e-5. Stimulated: SNR=11 single-shot with N_probe=100. Ratio span matches 10^3-10^6.

qualitative_claims.claim: ~100 probe photons per mode for 5-sigma (Abstract line 44)
qualitative_claims.support: At omega=0.1*kappa, G=1.14 -> sqrt(N_probe)*1.14=5 -> N_probe ~ 19. Paper quotes 100 for comfortable SNR=11.

qualitative_claims.notes: Table 3 labels Paris_long (tau=100 ps) as 'Perturbative', but POLARITON_PLATFORMS['Paris_long'].tier1_regime = 'borderline' (Gamma_pol/kappa = 0.143 > 0.1 cutoff). Align table label with constants.py OR update cutoff.
